title: frankenia laevis subsp. hirsuta
intro: Frankenia laevis subsp. hirsuta, also known as hairy green saltbush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Frankenia laevis subsp. hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to benefit from its medicinal properties.
